nodes.label: dist_python/ (PyInstaller output depot)
nodes.description: Frozen PyInstaller output for the legacy Python/Qt GUI (gui.exe + bundled deps + ffmpeg.exe + whisper model cache). Intentionally excluded from semantic extraction; contents are generated by scripts/update_metrics.sh and PyInstaller spec files. Used only for releasing the legacy standalone build.

nodes.label: build_python/ (PyInstaller intermediate depot)
nodes.description: Intermediate PyInstaller analysis/compile cache. Safe to delete — regenerated on each frozen build. Not part of the active Rust/Tauri pipeline.

nodes.label: src-tauri/target/ (Cargo build depot)
nodes.description: Cargo build output for the Rust/Tauri shell. Release binaries land at src-tauri/target/release/*.exe and are bundled by tauri-build into the final installer. Excluded from semantic extraction.

nodes.label: releases/ (published artifacts depot)
nodes.description: Locally-staged release artifacts (MSI/NSIS installers) produced by tauri bundle. Uploaded to GitHub Releases, then mirrored to R2 via the Nuldrums launcher admin panel.

nodes.label: metrics/ (pre-computed cloc depot)
nodes.description: Cached cloc output (cloc.txt / cloc.json) used by AI agents instead of re-counting lines. Refresh via scripts/update_metrics.sh. Referenced by CLAUDE.md.

nodes.label: resources/ (runtime bundled assets depot)
nodes.description: Runtime assets bundled into the installer (ffmpeg.exe, whisper ggml models, ProgressBarGB font, about_profile.png). The resolve_resources_dir helper in server/config.rs searches exe/NSIS/dev-fallback paths to find this directory at runtime.
